symbols: dead bird — mortality and the transience of life
copper pot — domestic utility and earthly provision
onions — simple nourishment and humble sustenance
description: A large dead turkey lies on its back on a stone ledge, its legs bound and one wing spread open, displaying mottled brown and white feathers. Beside it sits a copper pot with a lid. Small red onions and other items are scattered at the base. The background is dark, drawing attention to the textures of feathers, metal, and produce.
